languages.text: "Мы одержали победу и вернули Патент. Ксенос капитулировал и выбросил нас обратно на флагман".
"We have prevailed and retrieved the Warrant. The xenos capitulated and cast us back to the flagship."
languages.original_text: "Мы одержали победу и вернули Патент. Ксенос капитулировал и выбросил нас обратно на флагман".

traits.locale_text: "We have prevailed and retrieved the Warrant. The xenos capitulated and cast us back to the flagship."
"We have prevailed and retrieved the Warrant. The xenos capitulated and cast us back to the flagship."
"We have prevailed and retrieved the Warrant. The xenos capitulated and cast us back to the flagship."
"We have prevailed and retrieved the Warrant. The xenos capitulated and cast us back to the flagship."

languages.text: 「我々は勝利し、令状を取り戻した。異種は降伏し、我々を旗艦に帰還させた」
languages.original_text: "We have prevailed and retrieved the Warrant. The xenos capitulated and cast us back to the flagship."

traits.locale_text: 「我々は勝利し、令状を取り戻した。異種は降伏し、我々を旗艦に帰還させた。」

languages.text: «Hemos triunfado y recuperado la Patente. El xenos ha cedido y nos ha devuelto a la nave insignia».
languages.original_text: "We have prevailed and retrieved the Warrant. The xenos capitulated and cast us back to the flagship."

traits.locale_text: «Hemos triunfado y recuperado la Patente. El xenos ha cedido y nos ha devuelto a la nave insignia».

languages.text: "Wir haben gesiegt und den Handelsbrief geborgen. Der Xenos hat kapituliert und uns auf das Flaggschiff zurückgeworfen."
languages.original_text: "We have prevailed and retrieved the Warrant. The xenos capitulated and cast us back to the flagship."

traits.locale_text: "Wir haben gesiegt und den Handelsbrief geborgen. Der Xenos hat kapituliert und uns auf das Flaggschiff zurückgeworfen."

languages.text: « Nous avons triomphé et récupéré la lettre de marque. Le xénos a capitulé et nous a renvoyés sur le vaisseau amiral. »
languages.original_text: "We have prevailed and retrieved the Warrant. The xenos capitulated and cast us back to the flagship."

traits.locale_text: « Nous avons triomphé et récupéré la lettre de marque. Le xénos a capitulé et nous a renvoyés sur le vaisseau amiral. »

languages.text: “我们取得了胜利，并夺回了贸易授状。异形不得不屈服，将我们送回了旗舰。”
languages.original_text: "We have prevailed and retrieved the Warrant. The xenos capitulated and cast us back to the flagship."

traits.locale_text: “我们取得了胜利，并夺回了贸易授状。异形不得不屈服，将我们送回了旗舰。”

languages.text: "Galip geldik ve Ruhsatname'yi geri aldık. Zenolar boyun eğdi, bizi sancak gemisine geri gönderdi."
languages.original_text: "We have prevailed and retrieved the Warrant. The xenos capitulated and cast us back to the flagship."

traits.locale_text: "Galip geldik ve Ruhsatname'yi geri aldık. Zenolar boyun eğdi, bizi sancak gemisine geri gönderdi."
